QEDMA raises $26M with participation from IBM to tackle quantum computing errors and accelerate pace to quantum advantage QEDMA, a leading developer of quantum noise resilience solutions, announced today $26 million in Series A funding. The round was led by Glilot Capital Partners through its early growth fund, Glilot+, with new participation from IBM, Korean Investment Partners, and others, alongside existing investors including TPY Capital.
